name: json-transform
description: Transforms JSON data using JMESPath expressions. Supports extracting, filtering, and reshaping JSON structures.
author: vessel-core

jmespath_expression.title: JMESPath Expression
jmespath_expression.description: JMESPath expression to apply to the input data. See https://jmespath.org for syntax reference.

output_format.title: Output Format
output_format.description: How to structure the output data.

fallback_value.title: Fallback Value
fallback_value.description: Value to use if the JMESPath expression returns null. Leave empty to output null.

jmespath_expression.ui:help: JMESPath expression to transform the input JSON. Examples: 'data[0]', 'items[?status==`active`]', '{total: length(items)}'

output_format.ui:help: 'raw' = expression result as-is, 'records' = wrap in {records: [...], record_count: N}, 'single' = wrap in {record: ...}

outputSchema.description: Transformed data structure, format depends on output_format setting.
